Is there an application fee?

There is no application fee for international students in Doğuş University. You can apply free of charge.

How can i apply?

You should register and apply through our

website

.

Do i need to take the TOEFL?

If you hold a TOEFL exam result, you should upload the certificate during the online application process. Score required for TOEFL IBT is 72. If not, then you are required to take the Doğuş University English Proficiency Exam (DUIYES) during the registration week.

What should i do if i cannot upload all the required documents to the online application system?

If you have a problem with this process, please inform us the situation and send the remaining documents via e-mail.

What are the tuition fees?

Please

click here

for the tuition fees and payment details.

I graduated from a foreign university and have recognition problem in Turkey. how can i solve this problem?

You need to contact Equivalency Unit of the Turkish Council of Higher Education. Please

click here

for the official website of the Equivalency Unit.

Will the university help me to get a student residence permit?

Yes, International Relations Officers will assist you in this process. You will be informed about the process via email before your arrival.

While recommendation letters or statements of purpose are not compulsory, they nonetheless may strengthen your application.

Tüm Sorular
